discovery.run_summary: Market mixed-quiet with VIX down, mega-cap tech split (META +3.7%, NVDA -1%), energy weak on Iran/Hormuz de-escalation chatter sending oil down 5%+. Key mid-cap story is DKS earnings miss on Foot Locker integration drag. ALK and BLDR continuation moves stand out without fresh catalysts.

notable_index_moves: XLE -1.49% on oil collapse from Iran de-escalation
XLP +1.14% defensive bid alongside risk-on tech, unusual pairing

discoveries.name: Dick's Sporting Goods Inc
discoveries.setup: Earnings miss tied to acquisition integration drag
discoveries.thesis: 8-K Item 2.02 + 8.01 confirms earnings event; CNBC explicitly attributes the miss to Foot Locker turnaround costs eating profitability even as the top line surges. The drop reflects a real, structural margin concern from a known M&A overhang rather than a one-time blip. Magnitude looks appropriate given DKS was a quality compounder with premium multiple — when integration risk on a contentious deal actually shows up in numbers, multiple compression of this scale is normal.
discoveries.what_confirms: Forward guidance reaffirms/raises Foot Locker investment spend; gross margin guidance walks down; sell-side cuts on integration timeline lengthening
discoveries.what_kills: Management call clarifies Foot Locker costs are front-loaded with clear exit ramp; legacy DKS comps remain strong and the miss was solely Foot Locker accounting — then fade-the-drop becomes viable
discoveries.what_to_learn: Quality retailers that complete contentious acquisitions tend to get punished symmetrically on the first integration-driven earnings miss — premium multiple unwinds rapidly when the bear case (Foot Locker dilution) gets confirmed in print.
discoveries.catalyst: Q1 earnings miss with Foot Locker integration costs hitting profitability
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 8-K filed 2026-05-27 with items 2.02 (results) + 8.01 (other events) corroborated by CNBC's article framing the miss as Foot Locker-driven margin damage.
research_pointers: Read the 8.01 'other events' exhibit — bundled with earnings often contains restructuring or guidance reset language
Compare legacy DKS comp growth to Foot Locker contribution to isolate core franchise health
Check Foot Locker brand-level commentary on the call for turnaround timeline
Watch for sell-side downgrades tomorrow — if consensus moves down sharply, the bottoming process will take time

discoveries.name: Alaska Air Group, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Continuation rally with no fresh 8-K, no scheduled earnings, sharp multi-day move
discoveries.thesis: Stock is up sharply over five days with another leg today and no company-specific catalyst visible to us. Could be fuel cost tailwind from oil's collapse (Iran de-escalation), broader airline re-rating, or unreported analyst action. Without evidence I can't pick a direction at conf 3+.
discoveries.what_confirms: Sector-wide airline rally would confirm fuel-cost beta thesis; isolated ALK strength would suggest company-specific news leaking
discoveries.what_kills: Peer airlines flat or down while ALK rips alone strongly suggests unknown idiosyncratic news; if oil rebounds and ALK holds, the fuel narrative breaks
discoveries.catalyst: No identified company catalyst; possibly oil-down/airline-up macro beta
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals empty; oil -5% on Iran/Hormuz news in the macro tape is the most plausible peripheral driver.
research_pointers: Check XAL/JETS performance today vs. ALK to test sector-vs-idiosyncratic
Scan for analyst upgrades or merger chatter — ALK had Hawaiian integration history
Check recent capacity guidance commentary at industry conferences

discoveries.name: Builders FirstSource, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Building products rally into rising mortgage rates
discoveries.thesis: BLDR has run sharply over the past week and added another leg today, but today's news flow includes mortgage refi demand dropping 18% as rates hit a nine-month high. That is a direct demand headwind for residential building products. The continuation move appears to be momentum-driven rather than fundamentally supported by the rate backdrop. Setup favors mean reversion if rates stay elevated.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued mortgage rate creep higher; housing starts data softening; peer building-product names (LPX, EXP) failing to confirm BLDR's strength
discoveries.what_kills: Tape-level rate reversal lower; specific M&A or capital-return announcement from BLDR; homebuilder peers (DHI, LEN) breaking out alongside
discoveries.what_to_learn: Momentum continuation in rate-sensitive industrials against a worsening rate tape is a recurring fade setup — the macro headwind tends to assert itself within two to three weeks.
discoveries.catalyst: No company-specific catalyst; momentum extension against deteriorating mortgage backdrop
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals empty; CNBC mortgage refi -18% article published this morning is the macro counterweight to the continuation move.
research_pointers: Compare BLDR's run to homebuilder index (XHB) — divergence suggests crowded short-covering or single-name flow
Check options skew for unusual call activity that could explain mechanical squeeze
Look for the last earnings call's commentary on lumber/single-family demand trajectory

discoveries.name: Beam Therapeutics Inc.
discoveries.setup: Biotech multi-day rally with no SEC filing or earnings event
discoveries.thesis: BEAM has run sharply over five days with another large move today. XBI was up only modestly so this is largely idiosyncratic. Base editing readouts, partnership news, or conference data are the usual catalysts in this name but I don't have direct evidence of any.
discoveries.what_confirms: Pipeline data release at an upcoming conference (ASH/ASGCT timing); Verve or Lilly partnership extension news; competitor (CRSP, NTLA) clinical setback
discoveries.what_kills: Move is pure short-squeeze with no fundamental news — would fade on first market-wide risk-off day
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals empty; XBI +0.82% does not explain BEAM +7%.
research_pointers: Check upcoming medical conference calendar (ASGCT typically May/June)
Scan biotech-specialist Twitter and Endpoints News for BEAM pipeline chatter
Look at short interest data — high SI biotech with no news often signals squeeze

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Oil down 5%+ on Iran/Strait of Hormuz de-escalation chatter
DKS earnings miss on Foot Locker integration drag

trump_signals.post_summary: Trump reaffirms CFTC authority over prediction markets and defends US crypto leadership
trump_signals.note: Reaffirmation of existing pro-crypto stance — not new policy. Marginally supportive for crypto-exposed names but unlikely to move tape on its own. The prediction-market specific language (CFTC vs. state AGs) is relevant for Kalshi/Polymarket ecosystem but no direct listed mid-cap pure-play.

ai_announcements.headline: Snowflake signs $6B five-year deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
ai_announcements.summary: Snowflake committing $6B to AWS for AI compute, framed as a win for Amazon's custom silicon (Trainium/Graviton) and a competitive challenge to Nvidia.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Snowflake AI CPU workloads are largely inference/data workloads where AWS custom silicon competes; training GPU demand remains Nvidia-dominated. Hyperscaler diversification is well-known.
research_pointers: Check if NVDA moved materially today on this headline
Snowflake's prior GPU/Nvidia commitments to compare displacement
AWS Trainium2/Graviton4 capacity ramp

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Marginal positive — validates AWS custom silicon strategy and locks in a flagship AI workload customer.
research_pointers: AWS AI revenue disclosures next earnings

ai_announcements.headline: Google AI Search backlash; DuckDuckGo installs +30%
ai_announcements.summary: Post-I/O 2026, Google replaced blue links with AI agents; user backlash drove DuckDuckGo install spike. SEO industry disruption ongoing.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: 30% DDG install spike is from a tiny base; Google search share moves <1pp historically on such events. AI Overviews may increase engagement/monetization per query long-term.
research_pointers: DDG absolute share vs Google
Google search query growth in next earnings

ai_announcements.headline: Salesforce lowers FY27 cash flow growth forecast; stock -3% AH
ai_announcements.summary: CRM guided FY27 operating cash flow growth to just 4%, missing expectations. Implicit AI monetization concern (Agentforce).

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Salesforce has data moat and Agentforce ramp could re-accelerate; cash flow timing may reflect investment cycle not demand loss.
research_pointers: Agentforce ARR disclosure on call
Seat count trend vs prior quarter — key AI cannibalization indicator
Compare to Cognition's $492M ARR — coding-agent disruption proxy

ai_announcements.headline: Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money; $492M ARR
ai_announcements.summary: AI coding startup more than doubles valuation in 8 months. Implicit threat to incumbent dev tools.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: GitHub Copilot benefits from broader AI coding TAM expansion; Cognition revenue may be additive not substitutive.
research_pointers: GitHub Copilot seat growth
Devin enterprise penetration

ai_announcements.headline: Amazon launches AI shopping assistant service for other retailers
ai_announcements.summary: Amazon white-labeling Rufus/Alexa for retail AI shopping to compete with Shopify, Salesforce Commerce, and others.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Most Shopify merchants are SMBs unlikely to embed Amazon tech into their store given competitive concerns. Shopify has its own Magic AI suite.
research_pointers: Which retailers sign on first
Shopify Magic engagement metrics

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Today's flagged stock moves (DKS, BEAM, ALK, AMR, PTCT, BLDR) appear unrelated to AI news. DKS -6% is on earnings (8-K item 2.02), not AI. BEAM/PTCT moves are biotech-specific. ALK/AMR/BLDR are cyclical/industrial. No AI-driven irrational selloff candidates identified in today's tape.
